mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_odm_confirmed ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT * FROM tb_odm_confirmed WHERE approval_status = #{approvalStatus} ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_odm_confirmed WHERE approval_status = #{approvalStatus}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_odm_confirmed (employee_name, disease_name, hazard_factor, diagnosis_agency, confirmed_date, claim_status, approval_status, remarks, created_at, modified_at) VALUES (#{employeeName}, #{diseaseName}, #{hazardFactor}, #{diagnosisAgency}, #{confirmedDate}, #{claimStatus}, #{approvalStatus}, #{remarks}, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_odm_confirmed SET employee_name = #{employeeName}, disease_name = #{diseaseName}, hazard_factor = #{hazardFactor}, diagnosis_agency = #{diagnosisAgency}, confirmed_date = #{confirmedDate}, claim_status = #{claimStatus}, approval_status = #{approvalStatus}, remarks = #{remarks}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
